prompt: Edit this photograph. Keep the woman, her navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress, her pose, hands, hair, face, the black strappy sandals, and the warm late-afternoon sunlight and its shadows EXACTLY as they are. Do not change the dress, the model, or the lighting. Improve ONLY the realism of the surroundings: render the background plaster wall, stone steps, ground and architecture in crisp, natural photographic focus and remove the soft artificial blur at the back of the frame, so the whole scene looks like one real photograph with only gentle, believable depth of field. Replace the sea so it has a clean, level, realistic horizon line meeting a natural sky. Keep the warm Cycladic Milos setting: chalky white walls, worn stone, deep blue Aegean sea. Photorealistic, fully consistent light across the frame.
